notes: Send all 6 starting villagers to sheep and keep making villagers.
Scout for sheep, gold, and the nearest Sacred Sites.
Put 3 villagers on wood and build a Lumber Camp.
Build a Mosque and start producing Scholars — they research your (free) technologies faster.
Keep most villagers on food; add a Mill on berries.
Send Scholars into buildings to speed research, and start the free economy upgrades early (they're slow, so begin now).
Send 3 villagers to gold with a Mining Camp.
With about 400 food and 200 wood, age up — the Tower of Victory buffs your early army; Dome of the Faith helps hold Sacred Sites.
Keep researching free upgrades during the age-up — Delhi snowballs on tech leads.
Plan which Sacred Site you'll grab as you hit Feudal.
In Feudal, take a Sacred Site with a unit to start earning passive gold.
Make Man-at-Arms and Spearmen; with the Tower of Victory their attack is buffed near it.
Defend your Sacred Site and pressure the enemy with your upgraded infantry.
Keep Scholars researching — your free upgrade lead grows every minute.
Bank resources behind your tech lead and add a Barracks/Stable to grow the army.
Begin the Castle Age age-up when the front is stable.
In Castle Age, add War Elephants or Tower Elephants behind your upgraded infantry.
Your free, fully-researched units should out-trade the enemy — push for the map.
